package rulefixtures

// scenario for mixed_receiver_kinds: Methods on the same receiver type mix pointer and value receivers.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: consistency; severity: contextual.
type Rule231PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario231Positive(records []Rule231PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
